services:
  - type: web
    name: ivx-holdings-platform
    repo: https://github.com/ibb142/rork-ivxholding--1
    branch: main
    runtime: docker
    dockerfilePath: ./Dockerfile
    dockerContext: .
    dockerCommand: node /app/node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs /app/server.ts
    plan: starter
    # IVX: auto-deploy on every push to main (owner-requested).
    autoDeployTrigger: commit
    healthCheckPath: /health
    domains:
      - api.ivxholding.com
    renderSubdomainPolicy: disabled
    disk:
      name: ivx-holdings-data
      mountPath: /app/data
      sizeGB: 1

        value: production
      - key: HOST
        value: 0.0.0.0
      - key: PORT
        value: 3000
      - key: CHAT_DATABASE_PATH
        value: /app/data/chat-room.sqlite
